description_long: This is a modern, L-shaped chaise lounge upholstered in a deep teal fabric. The design features a wide, low seat with a single extended section for leg support, creating a comfortable lounging area. Both the backrest and armrests are thick, boxy, and fully upholstered, providing a sense of enclosure and support on three sides. The upholstery appears smooth and tightly fitted, with minimal visible seams or decorative elements, giving it a sleek, contemporary look. The base of the chaise is low to the ground, with no visible legs, suggesting a solid, block-like construction. The overall form is geometric and minimalist, suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, teal L-shaped chaise lounge with thick, boxy armrests and backrest, upholstered in smooth fabric. Its minimalist, low-profile design offers a comfortable lounging area with an extended seat for leg support.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, thick armrests, and the extended leg support section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the protruding leg rest, with the armrest visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, boxy backrest and the symmetry of the chaise's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the extended leg support from the other side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, thick, and rectangular, extending along the rear and partially along the side of the chaise. It is fully upholstered in smooth fabric with no visible decorative elements or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, matching the height and thickness of the backrest, and are positioned at the ends of the L-shape.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the chaise appears to have a solid, block-like base that sits directly on the ground, giving it a grounded and stable appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid teal color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: The chaise features integrated, attached cushions forming the seat and backrest, with a single extended cushion for the leg support. All cushions are flush and seamlessly connected, creating a unified, minimalist appearance.
